overview_table.Features: Aurora I Stellar Fragment Ability Improvement
Glimpse Filaments II Oracle Vision Feature

features.name: Divine Spellcasting
features.description:
As an Oracle, you are able to prepare and cast spells from the Divine
spell list:

- **Spells Prepared.** At 1st Rank, you may prepare 6 spells for this
  Class at the end of each long rest. You may cast those prepared spells
  using this feature.

- **Class Circle Cap.** Each spell you prepare may have a maximum
  baseline Circle of 1st Circle.

- **Heightening.** When you cast spells using this feature, you may
  heighten spells up to your Class Circle Cap.

- **Spell Points.** At 1st Rank, you gain 4 Spell Points. When you cast
  spells using this feature, you must expend Spell Points equal to the
  Circle of the spell. Spell Points are regained at the end of each long
  rest.

- **Spellcasting Modifier.** Your spellcasting modifier when casting
  spells using this feature is WIS.

  - **Your Spell Attack Bonus** = your WIS + your Tier Bonus

  - **Your Spell Save DC** = 8 + your WIS + your Tier Bonus

  - **Spellcasting Checks** made with spells prepared for this class use
    your WIS.

- **Signature Spell.** Your designated signature spell may be one of the
  1st Circle or higher spells prepared for this feature.

- **Higher Ranks.** At higher Ranks, the spells prepared, Spell Points,
  and Class Circle Cap all improve as described in the Class Overview
  Table.

features.name: Oracle Vision
features.description:
At 1st Rank, you choose an Oracle Vision to represent the future you
have witnessed but not yet formed. You gain features from this chosen
Oracle Vision at 1st, 4th, and 8th Rank.

features.name: Radiance
features.flavor_text: Cascading from distant beginnings, carved by your hand as an effigy to a future held adrift in your dreams. Let it go on.
features.description:
At 1st Rank, once per round after casting a spell, you may take a free
action to manifest either a **Mote of Insight** or **Mote of Power**
described below:

- **Mote of Insight.** You cause a target within 60 feet of you to
  **regain 1d8 ST**.

- **Mote of Power**. You deal **1d8 radiant or necrotic damage** (you
  choose which) to a target within 60 feet of you.

Both 1d8's are your *radiance die* and it becomes 2d8/3d8/4d8 at
4th/7th/10th Rank, respectively. Your chosen Oracle Vision grants
additional effects both your **Mote of Insight** and **Mote of Power**.

features.name: Glimpse I
features.flavor_text: Nameless words etched into the tapestry.
features.description:
At 2nd Rank, once per rest as an action, you may *predict* a d20 roll.
When you predict a d20 roll, you roll a d20 and record its outcome: the
next time any creature rolls a d20 within the next 10 minutes, the
predicted outcome is used instead (this is called *using a predicted d20
roll*).

If a creature rolls an ability check with advantage or disadvantage, a
predicted d20 roll is used to determine the outcome of only one of the
d20s rolled. Thus, when rolling more d20s than are predicted, an ability
check's outcome may still be uncertain.

## Communication

You may not share the numeric outcome of d20 rolls you predict with your
fellow players (though you may with the GM), though you may provide
advice to your allies on what they should do based on what you know.

## Stacking Predictions

At later Ranks, you may gain features that allow you to predict multiple
d20 rolls with one usage of **Glimpse**. If so, record the order in
which d20s are rolled. The predicted d20 rolls are used in the same
order they were recorded. If **Glimpse** is used multiple times (or by
multiple creatures), newly predicted d20 rolls are appended after
currently unused predicted d20 rolls.

features.name: Glimpse Filaments I
features.description:
At 2nd Rank, select one of the following Glimpse Filament features from
the list below, which enhance the capabilities of your **Glimpse**
feature. During the Retrain downtime activity, you may redo the
selection of all of your chosen Glimpse Filaments.

### Sloughing Facade

2nd Rank Oracle Glimpse Reflection

When you use **Glimpse**, you may become **aware** of all creatures and
objects within 120 feet of you of which you were previously
**uncertain**.

### Threaded Guidance

2nd Rank Oracle Glimpse Reflection

When an ally uses one of your predicted d20 rolls, you may manifest your
**Mote of Insight** from your **Radiance** feature.

### Visionary Dominion

2nd Rank Oracle Glimpse Reflection

When a hostile creature uses one of your predicted d20 rolls, you may
manifest your **Mote of Power** from your **Radiance** feature.

features.name: Yearning Precipice
features.flavor_text: As words leak from the page, an ocean swells with possibility. Something washes onto the shore.
features.description:
At 3rd Rank, while preparing your spells at the end of a long rest, you
may choose two spells you are able to prepare for the Oracle class and
present them to the GM. The GM will reply with which spell they believe
to be more likely to be useful before the end of the next long rest.

features.name: Ability Improvement
features.description:
At 3rd, 6th, and 9th Rank, you gain an Ability Improvement. Each time
you gain an Ability Improvement, distribute three permanent +1 increases
to your ability modifiers. You may increase the same ability modifier
multiple times.

The maximum ability modifier that may be achieved is limited by your
character's Level. The maximum is +5 at Level 3, increases to +6 at
Level 6, and finally becomes +7 at Level 9.

features.name: Exploration
features.description:
At 4th, 7th, and 10th Rank, you gain an Exploration with Oracle being
the exploring Class. Each time you gain an Exploration, you gain the
following benefit:

- **Bonus Rank.** You choose any Class other than Oracle and gain one
  Rank in the chosen Class.

features.name: Oracle Vision Feature
features.description: At 4th Rank, you gain a feature for your Oracle Vision.

features.name: Glimpse II
features.flavor_text: A cry, a response, and the space betwixt.
features.description:
At 5th Rank, you may use **Glimpse** twice per rest. When you use
**Glimpse**, you may predict an additional d20 roll.

features.name: Aurora I
features.flavor_text: Authored into the annals of fate is a great circle writ by many hands.
features.description:
At 6th Rank, once per rest, when you manifest a **Mote of Insight** or
**Mote of Power** from your **Radiance** feature, you may designate a 10
foot radius sphere originating at a target location within 60 feet of
you. If you do, your radiance die is doubled and the effect is applied
to all creatures and objects in the area.

features.name: Stellar Fragment
features.flavor_text: In the gap between heartbeats, you draw a morsel of your soul. Woven as a gift, it joins with greater purpose.
features.description:
At 6th Rank, you may spend a minute (which may be concurrent with a
rest) and expend a Resolve to give a nearby ally a *stellar fragment*.
When a creature with a stellar fragment is about to burn a Resolve, they
may instead destroy the stellar fragment to gain the effects of burning
a Resolve. Additionally, creatures that have a stellar fragment count as
having a Resolve remaining.

While the stellar fragment persists, you cannot regain the Resolve spent
to create it.

features.name: Ability Improvement
features.description:
At 6th Rank, you gain an Ability Improvement. Each time you gain an
Ability Improvement, distribute three permanent +1 increases to your
ability modifiers. You may increase the same ability modifier multiple
times.

The maximum ability modifier that may be achieved is limited by your
character's Level. The maximum is +5 at Level 3, increases to +6 at
Level 6, and finally becomes +7 at Level 9.

features.name: Exploration
features.description:
At 7th Rank, you gain an Exploration with Oracle being the exploring
Class. Each time you gain an Exploration, you gain the following
benefit:

- **Bonus Rank.** You choose any Class other than Oracle and gain one
  Rank in the chosen Class.

features.name: Glimpse Filaments II
features.flavor_text: The lucid melody no longer clouded by the narrowing dust.
features.description:
At 8th Rank, select one of the following Glimpse Filament features from
the list below or one listed at an earlier Rank. During the Retrain
downtime activity, you may redo the selection of all of your chosen
Glimpse Filaments.

### Course of Enaction

8th Rank Oracle Glimpse Reflection

When you use **Glimpse**, you may take a free Dodge action.

### Drifting Locality

8th Rank Oracle Glimpse Reflection

After you use **Glimpse**, you may grant one of the following effects to
the next 1st Circle or higher spell you cast this turn:

- **Externality.** If the spell's range is measured in feet, you may add
  30 feet to the range.

- **Internality.** If the spell is listed with a WIS heightening
  enhancement, you may heighten the spell by one Circle and apply that
  enhancement.

### Encroaching Thunder

8th Rank Oracle Glimpse Reflection

When you use **Glimpse**, you may require the GM to tell you which
creatures will take their turn when the next combat team takes
initiative.

features.name: Oracle Vision Feature
features.description: At 8th Rank, you gain a feature for your Oracle Vision.

features.name: Aurora II
features.flavor_text: Searing might and nurturing warmth held hand-in-hand. The sun never truly sets.
features.description:
At 9th Rank, you may use **Aurora** twice per rest. When you use
**Aurora**, you may increase the area's radius to 15 feet.

features.name: Ability Improvement
features.description:
At 9th Rank, you gain an Ability Improvement. Each time you gain an
Ability Improvement, distribute three permanent +1 increases to your
ability modifiers. You may increase the same ability modifier multiple
times.

The maximum ability modifier that may be achieved is limited by your
character's Level. The maximum is +5 at Level 3, increases to +6 at
Level 6, and finally becomes +7 at Level 9.

features.name: Vitreous Glance
features.flavor_text: You are the words proclaimed into stale air. You are the observer left without a message. You stand at the gates of the forgotten and look past one more time.
features.description:
At 10th Rank, at any point, you may use **Glimpse** as a reaction
(expending one of its usages).

features.name: Exploration
features.description:
At 10th Rank, you gain an Exploration with Oracle being the exploring
Class. Each time you gain an Exploration, you gain the following
benefit:

- **Bonus Rank.** You choose any Class other than Oracle and gain one
  Rank in the chosen Class.

features.name: Fateful Hour
features.flavor_text: Tomorrow only holds what has been bestowed.
features.description:
At 11th Rank, when an ally that has one of your stellar fragments makes
a saving throw, they may destroy it to add your radiance die to the
total. If they do, they gain advantage on all subsequent saving throws
for the next 10 minutes.

features.name: Prophesy
features.flavor_text: The unseeable, unspeaking future trapped within smoky glass. Tremors are felt beneath the chilling, slick marble.
features.description:
At 12th Rank, once per rest when you use **Glimpse**, you may predict an
additional five d20 rolls and manifest both your **Mote of Insight** and
**Mote of Power** from your **Radiance** feature.

features.name: Final Reach
features.description:
When you reach character Level 12, you compute your *Total Rank*, which
is calculated as:

###### The sum of all of your Class Ranks

If your Total Rank is less than 16 when you reach Level 12, then for
each deficient Rank, you may choose one of the benefits below to modify
a feature granted by one of your Class Ranks:

- **Maneuvers.** You learn two additional maneuvers.

- **Battlecasting.** You gain a maneuver, an additional Spell Point, and
  an additional prepared spell for that Class.

- **Spellcasting.** You gain three additional Spell Points and three
  additional prepared spells for that Class.

Oracle Visions

features.name: Oracle Vision: Calamity
features.flavor_text: You have witnessed the boundary past which eons cease. As the ruinous future reaches its hand into the present, you are emboldened to see the path forward.
features.description:
## Well of Determination

*Not yet. Not ever.*

At 1st Rank, you have a pool of points called your *well of
determination*. After each time you or an ally within 60 feet of you
fails a saving throw, you may add 1 point to your well of determination.
You may have at most 5 points in your well of determination and all
points are discarded when you complete a long rest.

As a reaction when an ally within 60 feet of you makes a saving throw,
you may expend up to 3 points from your well of determination to add the
number of points spent to the total.

## Fated Radiance

*Ruin is swift and without remorse. Thinking forward, its incidence can
be averted.*

At 1st Rank, your **Radiance** feature is enhanced in the following
ways:

- **Disaster.** If a subject damaged by **Mote of Power** is killed,
  knocked out, or burns a Resolve, you may cause a second target within
  5 feet of the original to also be dealt damage by **Mote of Power**.
  **Disaste**r may not activate itself.

- **Protection**. Creatures affected by **Mote of Insight** also gain a
  DB 5 against **elemental damage**. This DB becomes 10/15/20 at
  4th/7th/10th Rank respectively.

## From the Ashes

*Dust settles upon the charred grasses. The path is never truly gone.*

At 4th Rank, when you use **Glimpse**, you may add 2 points to your well
of determination.

## Setting Sun

*Beyond the end of it all, the world must continue.*

At 8th Rank, your **Well of Determination** feature is improved in the
following ways:

- In addition to when an ally within 60 feet of you fails a saving
  throw, you may also add 1 point to your well of determination whenever
  a hostile creature within 60 feet of you fails a saving throw.

- You may hold up to 7 points in your well of determination.

- You spend up to 5 points from your well of determination at a given
  time.

features.name: Oracle Vision: Discovery
features.flavor_text: Great mysteries lie beyond the penumbra of the world's knowledge. As the tapestry of enigma erodes away, its glittering facets choreograph a new thread of inquiry.
features.description:
## Brilliance

*Knowledge is the truest power.*

At 1st Rank, once per rest when you make an Analyze check against a
target, you may repeatedly manifest either your **Mote of Insight** or
**Mote of Power** (you choose each time) from your **Radiance** feature
a number of times equal to the number of Analyze check DC thresholds you
meet for the target.

## Enigmatic Radiance

*The death of a question only lies when all have failed to answer it.*

At 1st Rank, your **Radiance** feature is enhanced in the following
ways:

- **Clarity.** Creatures that regain ST from **Mote of Insight** are
  also cleansed of the disoriented condition.

- **Illumination**. You immediately **perceive** any creature damaged by
  **Mote of Power** that you were previously **aware** of.

## Precognition

*A future molded by the knowledge of knowledge.*

At 4th Rank, when you use **Glimpse**, you may take a free Analyze
action. After learning the predicted d20 roll outcome but before making
the Analyze check, you may postpone the usage of the predicted d20 roll
to the next d20 roll after your Analyze check.

## Knotted Throughline

*Pull upon the thread and carve your truths unto the face of the world.*

At 8th Rank, if you use **Brilliance** on an Analyze check that succeeds
the highest Analyze check DC threshold for the target, your usage of
**Brilliance** is not expended.

features.name: Oracle Vision: Unity
features.flavor_text: With each passing dawn you alight with the understanding that your fates are bound. That you alone do not hold the procession of stars in the night sky or the passage of time from one moment to the next. In that misunderstood futility, you find power.
features.description:
## Heartbound Nail

*As one, we pierce the veil.*

At 1st Rank, you may append the **Golden Blade** cantrip to the list of
spells you prepare for the Oracle class. Some spells have effects that
can *upgrade* as indicated in the spell's description (e.g. **Armor of
Souls** can upgrade). When you deal damage with **Golden Blade** while
concentrating on an upgraded spell effect, you also **regain ST** equal
to the damage dealt by the spell.

## Collective Radiance

*In our hands clasped together, we pool the potential of a new
beginning.*

At 1st Rank, your **Radiance** feature is enhanced in the following
ways:

- **Binding.** When you cause a creature to regain ST from **Mote of
  Insight**, you may cause a second target creature within 5 feet of the
  original to also regain ST from **Mote of Insight**. **Binding** may
  not activate itself.

- **Combination.** After damaging a target with **Mote of Power**, the
  next attack made by your initiative partner this turn against the
  target treats their AC as being reduced by one guard step (they either
  have their Full Guard AC, Half Guard AC, or Base AC).

## Coiled Mettle

*The whetstone of promise sharpening a decisive blow.*

At 4th Rank, when an ally uses a predicted d20 roll for an attack check,
the attack's critical hit threshold is reduced by 1.

## Spear of Tomorrow

*Wishes hewn into rays of blistering starlight.*

At 8th Rank, while concentrating on an upgraded spell effect, you gain
the following benefits:

- When you cast **Golden Blade**, you may cause the spell's range to
  become 30 feet and reclassify the melee spell attack as a ranged spell
  attack.

- You gain advantage on **Golden Blade** spell attacks.
